title: Vacuum Leak Energy Loss Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator to estimate energy loss, cost, and carbon emissions from vacuum leaks in compressed air systems, based on ISO 1217, ISO 8573-1, and Lean Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Equivalent Leak Diameter (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated diameter of the leak orifice, typically measured via ultrasonic leak detector or flow test.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated diameter of the leak orifice, typically measured via ultrasonic leak detector or flow test.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sızıntı deliğinin tahmini çapı, genellikle ultrasonik sızıntı dedektörü veya akış testi ile ölçülür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Durchmesser der Lecköffnung, typischerweise gemessen mit Ultraschall-Leckdetektor oder Durchflusstest.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre estimé de l'orifice de fuite, généralement mesuré par détecteur ultrasonique ou test de débit.

inputs.label: System Pressure (bar gauge)
inputs.businessContext: Operating pressure of the compressed air system at the point of leak.

businessContext_i18n.en: Operating pressure of the compressed air system at the point of leak.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sızıntı noktasında basınçlı hava sisteminin çalışma basıncı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betriebsdruck des Druckluftsystems an der Leckstelle.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression de fonctionnement du système d'air comprimé au point de fuite.

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Year
inputs.businessContext: Total annual hours the vacuum/compressed air system is in operation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual hours the vacuum/compressed air system is in operation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vakum/basınçlı hava sisteminin yıllık toplam çalışma saati.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures annuelles totales de fonctionnement du système de vide/air comprimé.

inputs.label: Electricity Cost ($/kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of electricity per kilowatt-hour, including demand charges if applicable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost of electricity per kilowatt-hour, including demand charges if applicable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Talep bedelleri dahil olmak üzere kilovatsaat başına ortalama elektrik maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Stromkosten pro Kilowattstunde, einschließlich Leistungspreisen falls zutreffend.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen de l'électricité par kilowattheure, incluant les frais de demande si applicable.

inputs.label: Compressor Specific Power (kW per 100 cfm)
inputs.businessContext: Power consumption of the compressor per 100 cfm of free air delivered. Typical range 16-22 kW/100 cfm for rotary screw compressors.

label_i18n.tr: Kompresör Özgül Gücü (100 cfm başına kW)
label_i18n.fr: Puissance spécifique du compresseur (kW par 100 cfm)

businessContext_i18n.en: Power consumption of the compressor per 100 cfm of free air delivered. Typical range 16-22 kW/100 cfm for rotary screw compressors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 100 cfm serbest hava debisi başına kompresörün güç tüketimi. Vidalı kompresörler için tipik aralık 16-22 kW/100 cfm.
businessContext_i18n.de: Leistungsaufnahme des Kompressors pro 100 cfm freier Luftlieferung. Typischer Bereich 16-22 kW/100 cfm für Schraubenkompressoren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation électrique du compresseur par 100 cfm d'air libre délivré. Plage typique 16-22 kW/100 cfm pour les compresseurs à vis rotative.

inputs.label: Ambient Temperature (°C)
inputs.businessContext: Average ambient temperature at compressor intake, affects air density and mass flow.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average ambient temperature at compressor intake, affects air density and mass flow.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kompresör girişindeki ortalama ortam sıcaklığı, hava yoğunluğunu ve kütle akışını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Umgebungstemperatur am Kompressoreinlass, beeinflusst Luftdichte und Massenstrom.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température ambiante moyenne à l'admission du compresseur, affecte la densité de l'air et le débit massique.

inputs.label: Leak Type (Orifice Shape Factor)
inputs.businessContext: Shape factor affects discharge coefficient. Round is typical for drilled holes; sharp for cracks; long for pipes.

label_i18n.fr: Type de fuite (facteur de forme de l'orifice)

businessContext_i18n.en: Shape factor affects discharge coefficient. Round is typical for drilled holes; sharp for cracks; long for pipes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şekil faktörü boşaltma katsayısını etkiler. Yuvarlak delikler için tipik, keskin çatlaklar için keskin, uzun borular için uzun.
businessContext_i18n.de: Formfaktor beeinflusst Ausflusskoeffizienten. Rund ist typisch für gebohrte Löcher; scharf für Risse; lang für Rohre.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le facteur de forme affecte le coefficient de décharge. Rond est typique pour les trous percés ; aigu pour les fissures ; long pour les tuyaux.

inputs.label: Include Carbon Cost Calculation
inputs.businessContext: If enabled, calculates CO2 emissions and associated cost based on grid emission factor.

label_i18n.fr: Inclure le calcul du coût carbone

businessContext_i18n.en: If enabled, calculates CO2 emissions and associated cost based on grid emission factor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Etkinleştirilirse, şebeke emisyon faktörüne göre CO2 emisyonlarını ve ilişkili maliyeti hesaplar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn aktiviert, berechnet CO₂-Emissionen und zugehörige Kosten basierend auf dem Netz-Emissionsfaktor.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si activé, calcule les émissions de CO₂ et le coût associé en fonction du facteur d'émission du réseau.

rules.message: Leak diameter must be greater than 0 mm.
System pressure must be between 1 and 15 bar gauge.
Operating hours must be between 1000 and 8760 hours per year.
Electricity cost must be greater than 0.
Specific power must be between 10 and 30 kW/100 cfm.
Ambient temperature must be between -10°C and 50°C.

rules.condition: include_carbon_cost == false OR (include_carbon_cost == true AND emission_factor_kg_co2_per_kwh > 0)
rules.message: Emission factor must be positive if carbon cost is included.

thresholds.message: Annual energy loss exceeds 50,000 kWh. Immediate leak repair recommended.
Annual cost exceeds $10,000. Urgent action required.
Annual CO2 emissions exceed 20,000 kg. Consider sustainability initiatives.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
